brand_identity.name: ISCHUS LLC
brand_identity.mission: Backing the visionaries who build the future.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tight font-extrabold leading-[0.9]
scale.caption: text-xs tracking-widest uppercase text-zinc-600

layout_strategy.grid_system: Use a 12-column grid. For portfolio, use 'Bento' style asymmetry (span-4 vs span-8).

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-white hover:border-zinc-600 hover:bg-zinc-900 rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all

cards.style: bg-zinc-900/30 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-white/10 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-zinc-800 focus:border-white text-white rounded-none px-0 py-4 outline-none transition-colors placeholder:text-zinc-700

effects: Soft radial gradients behind hero text

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure `tailwind.config.js` has `darkMode: 'class'` and the custom colors from the palette.
2. GLOBAL CSS: Add @import for 'Manrope' font. Set body background to #030303 and text to #EDEDED.
3. NAVIGATION: Create a floating glassmorphism navbar (bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl).
4. HERO: Use the 'hero_background' image with a heavy black gradient overlay (opacity 0.7) so text pops.
5. FORMS: Use shadcn/ui Input and Textarea, but style them with `border-b` only (minimalist) instead of full outline.
6. DATABASE: Connect the Contact and Pitch forms to the backend API which stores to MongoDB.
7. ANIMATION: Use `framer-motion` for simple scroll reveals on all sections. Don't overdo it.
8. TEAM: Display team members in a grayscale grid. Hovering reveals their name/role in white.
9. PORTFOLIO: Use a Bento Grid layout. Use solid dark colors or abstract gradients if no company logos are available.
10. FOOTER: Massive footer with big 'ISCHUS' text in the background (zinc-900).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Dark mode is the ONLY mode.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
Ensure all images have alt text.
